last_alert.reasoning: MSFT is now down ~2% from entry with no fundamental catalyst driving the decline — the Azure AI infrastructure thesis, Copilot monetization ramp, and OpenAI partnership remain intact. Broad tech weakness (QQQ -0.3%, NVDA -1.4%, META -0.7%) continues to suggest macro rotation rather than MSFT-specific deterioration. No earnings miss, no guidance cut, no management change, no competitive disruption — none of the defined fundamental change triggers have been met. At this position size (~€46 exposure), sitting through normal volatility is the disciplined call. Medium-term thesis requires weeks to months to play out.
